name: instagram_discovery_scraper
title: Instagram Discovery Search
description: Find Google-indexed public Instagram posts, reels, profiles, or recency-ranked reel candidates with transparent best-effort search semantics.

seo.title: Instagram Hashtag, Profile and Trending Reels Search
seo.description: Search Google-indexed public Instagram posts, reels, profiles, and recency-ranked reel candidates.
seo.intro: Instagram Discovery Search uses Google's public index for Instagram matches, filters the result URLs by operation, and returns normalized titles, snippets, handles, shortcodes, and pagination. Trending-reels mode is explicitly a public-search recency rank with day-to-week-to-month fallback—not Instagram's authenticated Explore ranking or a complete Instagram-native index.

useCases.title: Hashtag discovery
useCases.description: Find public posts and reels Google has indexed for a campaign or research hashtag.

useCases.title: Creator discovery
useCases.description: Find public Instagram profiles whose indexed profile or caption text matches a niche.

useCases.title: Acquisition research
useCases.description: Build a transparent first-pass lead or content set before deeper profile and post enrichment.

useCases.title: Public reel trend proxy
useCases.description: Collect recently indexed public reel candidates in search rank order, with the source and recency window disclosed.

faqs.question: Is this a complete Instagram search index?
faqs.answer: No. It is explicitly best-effort and depends on public Google indexing.

faqs.question: Does it need an Instagram login?
faqs.answer: No. It uses public search results and public Instagram URLs only.

faqs.question: Can it search only reels?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use reels mode for keyword search, hashtag mode with media_type set to reels, or trending_reels for a query-free public-search recency rank.

faqs.question: Is trending_reels Instagram's official trending feed?
faqs.answer: No. Logged-out Instagram Explore requires login. This mode transparently ranks recently Google-indexed public reels and reports that basis in every response.

mode.description: Search indexed hashtag posts, public profiles, keyword reels, or query-free recency-ranked reel candidates.

hashtag.description: Hashtag with or without # for hashtag mode.

query.description: Keyword phrase for profiles or reels mode.

media_type.description: Return indexed posts and reels or reels only.

date_posted.description: Optional Google recency filter for reels mode.

cursor.description: Next Google results page number from a previous response.

country.description: Optional two-letter country for localized Google results.

matched_from.description: Whether the match came from a profile or caption result
